Headline: #36 Broadway Temporary Reroute near State/Grand
ShortDescription: #36 Broadway buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near State/Grand, due to street blockage.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
36 Broadway buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions near State/Grand, due to street blockage.

Northbound buses will operate via Dearborn, Ohio, State and over regular route.

Southbound buses will operate via State, Grand, Clark, Hubbard, State and over regular route.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #29 State and #65 Grand Buses Temporary Reroute near State/Grand
ShortDescription: 29 State and 65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted due to street blockage near State/Grand.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound #29 State buses are temporarily rerouted via Grand, Fairbanks, Ontario, State, Grand, Clark, Hubbard, State and over normal route, due to street blockage near State/Grand.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Westbound #65 Grand buses are temporarily rerouted via Grand, Fairbanks. Ontario, State, Grand and over normal route due to street blockage near State/Grand.

Eastbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
